stemHtml: In addition to general aviation aircraft, which other types of aircraft fall under the scope of EU Regulation 923/2012?

options.a: Any aircraft registered with an ICAO member state or based in their engine manufacturer state.
options.b: Aircraft operating air traffic operations are limited to the airspace of the Union.
options.c: Aircraft bearing the nationality and registration marks of a Member State of ICAO.
options.d: Aircraft bearing the nationality and registration marks of a Member State of the Union.
